heading: Headquarters
label: 190108 Headquarters
text: The headquarters of the corporation shall be in the District of Columbia.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)19010836:236 (1st sentence).(1st sentence),June 30, 1950, ch. 431, § 1664 Stat. 315The word “national” is omitted as unnecessary.
